name: Peach
description: A juicy and sweet fruit that is great for fresh eating and baking.
variety_info: Includes Yellow, White, and Donut peaches.
attributes: Rich in vitamins, high in fiber.

name: Grape
description: Sweet and tart berries that grow in clusters.
attributes: High in antioxidants, low in calories.

name: Elderberry
description: A flowering shrub known for its dark berries and medicinal properties.
variety_info: Includes Black Sambucus and Red Elderberry.
attributes: Rich in vitamins, traditionally used for syrup.

name: Gooseberry
description: Small, tart berries that can be green, red, or purple.
attributes: Rich in vitamin C, high in antioxidants.

name: Wild Rose
description: A perennial flowering plant known for its fragrant blooms.
variety_info: Includes Rosa rugosa and Rosa canina.

name: Juniper
description: An evergreen shrub with needle-like leaves and berry-like cones.
variety_info: Includes Eastern Red Cedar and Procumbens.

name: Rhododendron
description: A flowering shrub known for its large, showy blooms.
variety_info: Includes Rhododendron catawbiense and Rhododendron maximum.

name: Azalea
description: A flowering shrub known for its vibrant colors and attractive foliage.
variety_info: Includes Southern Indica and Northern Lights.

name: Mountain Laurel
description: An evergreen shrub with beautiful clusters of flowers.
attributes: Attracts pollinators, thrives in acidic soil.

name: Elderberry Shrub
description: A shrub with clusters of white flowers that produce small, dark berries.
variety_info: Includes Black and Red Elderberry varieties.

name: Blueberry Shrub
description: A perennial fruit-bearing shrub that produces sweet, blue berries.

name: Manzanita
description: An evergreen shrub known for its beautiful bark and red berries.
variety_info: Includes various species like Arctostaphylos manzanita.

name: Sagebrush
description: A drought-resistant shrub that thrives in arid conditions.
variety_info: Commonly found in the western United States.

name: Sumac
description: A deciduous shrub that produces vibrant red berries.
attributes: Attracts birds, suitable for erosion control.

name: Gooseberry Shrub
description: A deciduous shrub that bears tart, edible berries.

name: Snowberry
description: A hardy shrub known for its white berries and attractive foliage.

name: Yucca
description: A drought-resistant succulent with sword-like leaves.
variety_info: Includes various species like Yucca filamentosa.

name: Pumpkin
description: A popular vegetable known for its large, round fruit.
variety_info: Includes pie pumpkins and carving pumpkins.

name: Butternut Squash
description: A sweet, nutty-flavored squash that is a fall favorite.
attributes: Requires warm weather, good for storage.

name: Zucchini
description: A fast-growing summer squash that produces abundant fruit.

name: Lettuce
description: Lettuce is a leafy green vegetable commonly used in salads.

name: Thimbleberry
description: Thimbleberry is a deciduous shrub with edible red berries.

name: Beach Plum
description: Beach plum is a coastal shrub that produces small, tart plums.

name: Honeyberry
description: Honeyberry is an early fruiting shrub with sweet, edible berries.

name: Aronia (Chokeberry)
description: Aronia is a hardy shrub valued for its nutrient-rich berries.

name: Witch Hazel
description: Witch hazel is a deciduous tree known for its striking fall foliage and unique flowers.

name: Spicebush
description: Spicebush is a fragrant shrub known for its aromatic leaves and berries.

name: Buttonbush
description: Buttonbush is a wetland shrub known for its unique, spherical flower clusters.

name: Ninebark
description: Ninebark is a hardy shrub known for its distinctive peeling bark and clusters of white flowers.

name: New Jersey Tea
description: New Jersey tea is a flowering shrub valued for its ornamental and medicinal properties.

name: Inkberry
description: Inkberry is a dense, evergreen shrub that produces small, black berries and thrives in wet soils.

name: American Beautyberry
description: American Beautyberry produces stunning clusters of purple berries in the fall and is great for wildlife.

name: Arrowwood Viburnum
description: This viburnum is known for its white flowers and attractive berries, making it a favorite for hedges.

name: Wax Myrtle
description: Wax Myrtle is a versatile shrub known for its aromatic leaves and waxy berries, often used for hedges.

name: Red Osier Dogwood
description: This shrub is notable for its striking red stems and is often used in wetland restoration.

name: Winterberry Holly
description: Winterberry Holly is a deciduous holly that produces bright red berries in winter, attracting birds.

name: Highbush Cranberry (Viburnum)
description: Highbush Cranberry is a large shrub that produces edible berries, often used for jams and jellies.

name: Bearberry (Kinnikinnick)
description: Bearberry is a low-growing evergreen shrub with red berries, often found in rocky, sandy soils.

name: Chicken of the Woods
description: A vibrant mushroom known for its bright colors, often found growing on trees.

name: Maitake
description: Maitake, also known as 'Hen of the Woods', is a popular edible mushroom with a distinct flavor.

name: Reishi
description: Reishi mushrooms are known for their medicinal properties and are often used in traditional medicine.
variety_info: Ganoderma lucidum is the most common type of Reishi.

name: Turkey Tail
description: Turkey Tail mushrooms are celebrated for their health benefits and are often used in herbal medicine.
variety_info: Trametes versicolor is the most recognized type.

name: Shiitake
description: Shiitake mushrooms are prized for their rich flavor and are commonly used in cooking.
variety_info: Lentinula edodes is the most popular variety.
